'''鈭歴-l-zh''' ('''salazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:luh|luh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:luh|luh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-l-zh
|-
! Lemma
| salazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:salazhithi|salazhithi]] || [[word:salazhiji|salazhiji]] || [[word:salazhishi|salazhishi]] || [[word:salazhi|salazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:salazhuthuth|salazhuthuth]] || [[word:salazhujuj|salazhujuj]] || [[word:salazhushush|salazhushush]] || [[word:salazh|salazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:salazhuthu|salazhuthu]] || [[word:salazhuju|salazhuju]] || [[word:salazhushu|salazhushu]] || [[word:salazhu|salazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:salazhufuth|salazhufuth]] || [[word:salazhufuj|salazhufuj]] || [[word:salazhufush|salazhufush]] || [[word:salazhuf|salazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:salazhethe|salazhethe]] || [[word:salazheje|salazheje]] || [[word:salazheshe|salazheshe]] || [[word:salazhe|salazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:salazhothoth|salazhothoth]] || [[word:salazhojoj|salazhojoj]] || [[word:salazhoshosh|salazhoshosh]] || [[word:salazh|salazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:salazhotho|salazhotho]] || [[word:salazhojo|salazhojo]] || [[word:salazhosho|salazhosho]] || [[word:salazho|salazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:salazhofoth|salazhofoth]] || [[word:salazhofoj|salazhofoj]] || [[word:salazhofosh|salazhofosh]] || [[word:salazhof|salazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:salazh忙th忙|salazh忙th忙]] || [[word:salazh忙j忙|salazh忙j忙]] || [[word:salazh忙sh忙|salazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:salazh忙|salazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:salazhathath|salazhathath]] || [[word:salazhajaj|salazhajaj]] || [[word:salazhashash|salazhashash]] || [[word:salazh|salazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:salazhatha|salazhatha]] || [[word:salazhaja|salazhaja]] || [[word:salazhasha|salazhasha]] || [[word:salazha|salazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:salazhafath|salazhafath]] || [[word:salazhafaj|salazhafaj]] || [[word:salazhafash|salazhafash]] || [[word:salazhaf|salazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:salazhasha|salazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosalazhasha|gosalazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisalazhasha|gokisalazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:salazhn眉sha|salazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosalazhnkn眉sha|gosalazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisalazhn眉sha|gokisalazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:salazhsh毛sha|salazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosalazhnksh毛sha|gosalazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisalazhsh毛sha|gokisalazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:salazhrosha|salazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosalazhnkrosha|gosalazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisalazhrosha|gokisalazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:salazhmusha|salazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosalazhnkmusha|gosalazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalazhmusha|gokisalazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:salazhsherasha|salazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosalazhnksherasha|gosalazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisalazhsherasha|gokisalazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:salazhngasha|salazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosalazhnkngasha|gosalazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisalazhngasha|gokisalazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:salazhyasha|salazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosalazhnkyasha|gosalazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisalazhyasha|gokisalazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:salazhyamasha|salazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosalazhnkyamasha|gosalazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisalazhyamasha|gokisalazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:salazhn眉sh毛sha|salazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosalazhnkn眉sh毛sha|gosalazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisalazhn眉sh毛sha|gokisalazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:salazhn眉rosha|salazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosalazhnkn眉rosha|gosalazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisalazhn眉rosha|gokisalazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salazhn眉musha|salazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosalazhnkn眉musha|gosalazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalazhn眉musha|gokisalazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:salazhsh毛n眉sha|salazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosalazhnksh毛n眉sha|gosalazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisalazhsh毛n眉sha|gokisalazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:salazhsh毛rosha|salazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosalazhnksh毛rosha|gosalazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisalazhsh毛rosha|gokisalazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salazhsh毛musha|salazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosalazhnksh毛musha|gosalazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalazhsh毛musha|gokisalazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:salazhron眉sha|salazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosalazhnkron眉sha|gosalazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisalazhron眉sha|gokisalazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:salazhrosh毛sha|salazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosalazhnkrosh毛sha|gosalazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisalazhrosh毛sha|gokisalazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:salazhromusha|salazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosalazhnkromusha|gosalazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisalazhromusha|gokisalazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:salazhmun眉sha|salazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosalazhnkmun眉sha|gosalazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisalazhmun眉sha|gokisalazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:salazhmush毛sha|salazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosalazhnkmush毛sha|gosalazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisalazhmush毛sha|gokisalazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:salazhmurosha|salazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosalazhnkmurosha|gosalazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisalazhmurosha|gokisalazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:salazh|salazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:s忙l忙zh|s忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosalazh|hosalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hos忙l忙zh|hos忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosalazh|hohosalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohos忙l忙zh|hohos忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉salazh|n眉salazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉s忙l忙zh|n眉s忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉salazh|n眉n眉salazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉s忙l忙zh|n眉n眉s忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂salazh|n茂salazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂s忙l忙zh|n茂s忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂salazh|n茂n茂salazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂s忙l忙zh|n茂n茂s忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusalazh|lusalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lus忙l忙zh|lus忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusalazh|lulusalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulus忙l忙zh|lulus忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisalazh|lisalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lis忙l忙zh|lis忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisalazh|lilisalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilis忙l忙zh|lilis忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosalazh|kosalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kos忙l忙zh|kos忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosalazh|kokosalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokos忙l忙zh|kokos忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesalazh|kesalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kes忙l忙zh|kes忙l忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesalazh|kekesalazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekes忙l忙zh|kekes忙l忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
